column5: If the robot failed, which of the below corrections do you think would have helped your communication? (Pick Top 3)

column5: Clarifying Prompt — “Sorry, I didn’t understand. Could you repeat the item?”, Multimodal Redundancy — Speech + lights highlight the drawer together., Guided Reset — “Let’s reset. Close all drawers and say the item again.”
